body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: validation_tooling
intelligence_level: advanced
durable_source_of_truth: "Merged PR #151"
objective: "Bad fixture: merged PR must not authorize new writes."
allowed_paths:
  - scripts/asgk.py
expected_output:
  - none
plan:
  - should fail
checklist:
  - should fail
acceptance_sheet:
  - should fail
non_goals:
  - new work
stop_conditions:
  - merged PR
rollback_expectations:
  - none
```
